note: Real holdings imported from broker export 2026-07-13. buy_price is the broker avg cost; buy_date is null where the export didn't include a purchase date (CAGR needs a date, so it stays hidden for those — no fabricated dates). symbol must be a valid NSE trading symbol; it does not need to be in watchlist.json, it is tracked automatically. Suspended/illiquid names (e.g. RCOM) may have no Angel token or candles — the pipeline logs that and the UI shows 'no data this cycle' rather than guessing. No code change needed; the next pipeline run picks up edits here.
